table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

td.span: An identifier of the health professional that is unique within a defined scope. Example: National health professional ID. Multiple identifiers could be provided.

td.style: font-size: 11px

font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

td.span: Professional role that the health professional is practicing at a given organisation. This is a generalisation of the FHIR PractitionerRole resource, which is used to represent the role of a practitioner in a specific context, such as a specific organisation or location.

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Health professional role. Multiple roles could be provided.

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.span: The organisation where this role is available

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck000.png)

span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: The specialty of a practitioner that describes the functional role they are practicing at a given organisation

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

description.value: Obligations for the logical model for health professional.

definition.value: Model for information about a health professional.

short.value: An identifier of the health professional that is unique within a defined scope. Example: National health professional ID. Multiple identifiers could be provided.

definition.value: An identifier of the health professional that is unique within a defined scope. Example: National health professional ID. Multiple identifiers could be provided.

short.value: Name of the health professional that has been treating or taking responsibility for the patient.

definition.value: Name of the health professional that has been treating or taking responsibility for the patient.

short.value: Identifies the purpose of this name.

definition.value: Identifies the purpose of this name.

short.value: Specifies the entire name as it should be displayed e.g. on an application UI.

definition.value: Specifies the entire name as it should be displayed e.g. on an application UI.

short.value: The family name/surname/last name of a person.

definition.value: The family name/surname/last name of a person.

short.value: Name parts that come before the name. Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name.

definition.value: Name parts that come before the name. Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name.

short.value: Name parts that come after the name. Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name.

definition.value: Name parts that come after the name. Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name.

short.value: Mailing and office or home addresses. The addresses are always sequences of address parts (e.g. street address line, country, postcode, city) even if postal address formats may vary depending on the country. An address may or may not include a specific use code; if this attribute is not present it is assumed to be the default address useful for any purpose.

definition.value: Mailing and office or home addresses. The addresses are always sequences of address parts (e.g. street address line, country, postcode, city) even if postal address formats may vary depending on the country. An address may or may not include a specific use code; if this attribute is not present it is assumed to be the default address useful for any purpose.

short.value: Telecommunication contact information (addresses) associated with a person, such as phone number, email, or messaging service. Multiple telecommunication addresses might be provided.

definition.value: Telecommunication contact information (addresses) associated with a person, such as phone number, email, or messaging service. Multiple telecommunication addresses might be provided.

short.value: Professional role that the health professional is practicing at a given organisation. This is a generalisation of the FHIR PractitionerRole resource, which is used to represent the role of a practitioner in a specific context, such as a specific organisation or location.

definition.value: Professional role that the health professional is practicing at a given organisation. This is a generalisation of the FHIR PractitionerRole resource, which is used to represent the role of a practitioner in a specific context, such as a specific organisation or location.

short.value: Health professional role. Multiple roles could be provided.

definition.value: Health professional role. Multiple roles could be provided.

short.value: The organisation where this role is available

definition.value: The organisation where this role is available

short.value: The specialty of a practitioner that describes the functional role they are practicing at a given organisation

definition.value: The specialty of a practitioner that describes the functional role they are practicing at a given organisation
